text.title: Monolith Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the monolith-architecture methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: confirm-fit
step.input: Team size, domain maturity, DevOps maturity.
step.action: Check r1 preconditions; if any fail, switch to modular-monolith.

step.name: pick-internal-layout
step.action: Choose vertical-slice (multi-feature teams) or layered (CRUD-heavy + small team).

step.name: wire-single-pipeline
step.action: Implement single pipeline (build → test → deploy); no per-service variants.

step.name: define-transaction-strategy
step.action: Wrap each operation in a single DB transaction; mark exceptions explicitly.

step.name: scale-plan
step.action: Set scale-up budget first; document scale-out plan only if budget exceeded.

step.name: document-extraction-triggers
step.action: Record triggers for future extraction (independent scaling, cadence, polyglot, fault isolation).
